issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' requires condition type 'LifeCount' with value 2, but condition is 'Always'
Action type is 'PlayFromHand' but card must be played from trash (rested), not hand. Should be 'PlayFromTrash' or equivalent zone-specific action
Missing rested state requirement: card must be played 'rested' but filter has no rest/duration modifier
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained and does not match card text. This appears to be erroneous
